history.content:
<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open safe cell to my right is the best immediate move to navigate toward the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05 column B. Relative to my current position, the cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I need to reorient toward the open path on my left side, which looks like the safest way to navigate around the lava and toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward would be unsafe. The safe open cell to my right is the best next move, so I will turn right to face it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell, while the goal is up and to the left, but not immediately reachable in one step. Moving forward keeps me in the open area and away from the lava at C6.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 06 column B. I am at row 07 column D, facing upward. The cell directly in front of me (row 06 column D) is safe, so moving forward brings me closer to the goal. I should avoid the lava at row 06 column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell directly in front of me is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The goal is visible to my left, but there is also lava immediately to my left-front area in the row, so I should not turn toward it blindly. The safest available move is to turn right to reorient toward the open unknown space on the right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The open cells are to my right, so I should turn right to face the free path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 07 column F, which is directly to my right. Since I am facing upward (`^`), I need to turn right once to face the goal, then I can move toward it on the next step. The cell to my right is lava only after turning? No, as viewed now the cell in front of me is safe, but the goal is not directly ahead. Turning right is the best first move toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward, and the cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is visible slightly above and to the left, but I need to reorient first. Turning left will face me toward the open path on my left side, which is the safest available move.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly visible to my right on row 07 column F, but I am currently facing upward, so I cannot move toward it yet. The cell in front of me is safe, but moving forward would take me away from the goal. Turning right will orient me toward the goal and also avoid the lava at E7.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D, facing upward. The cell directly ahead is row 06 column D, which is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safest visible move is to turn right, which will let me reorient toward the open floor cells on my left/right relative to the map and avoid the lava in front.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is visible to my left, but I need to reorient first. Turning left will face me toward the open path and the goal direction while avoiding the lava next to it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05 column D, which is directly ahead of me in the same column and one cell forward after I rotate toward it. I am currently facing up, and the cell in front is a wall, so I cannot move forward yet. Turning left will orient me toward the open path on my left, which is safe and leads around the obstacle toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 07 column F, which is directly to my right. The cell in front of me is safe floor, but moving forward would not reach the goal as efficiently. Since I’m facing up and need to go right, I should turn clockwise first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The cells to my left include lava, so the safest available move is to turn right to face the open path toward the goal area.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>
